record.text: Fabric is an agent-first repository decision and provenance protocol. Its CLI is a protocol client for coordinating multiple threads and worktrees, propagating findings and decisions with evidence and rationale, preventing repeated mistakes, and eventually letting users trace why an agent chose a path back to prior threads, PRs, and human direction. Provider integrations should adapt Codex, Claude, Cursor, and future agents to this shared protocol rather than make Fabric a provider-specific GitHub or LLM wrapper.
